message:
chore: add pt-bundle module, e2e workflow tests, and misc improvements

- Add pt-bundle reader/writer for .ptb archive format
- Add e2e_workflow.rs integration tests
- Update Cargo.lock with new dependencies
- Minor cleanups in pt-common capabilities, id, categories
- Update causal_interventions with extended recovery expectations
- Fix config resolution edge cases
- Update BATS tests for config handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
